entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for yield stability under drought.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the rice crop.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental stress condition affecting rice yield.

entities.name: QDTY12.1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus associated with maintaining yield under drought.

entities.name: DECUSSATE
entities.description: The gene (OsDEC) encoded by the qDTY12.1 locus.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTIONAL NETWORK MODELING
entities.description: The process of modeling gene expression networks to identify core and peripheral genes.

entities.name: FLORAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of flower formation coordinated by the DEC-network.

entities.name: CYTOKININ SIGNALING PATHWAY
entities.description: The signaling pathway through which OsDEC coordinates with peripheral genes.

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A mechanism to avoid drought-induced depletion of photosynthate.

entities.name: SOURCE-SINK DYNAMICS
entities.description: The physiological relationship between nutrient production and usage that sustains reproductive transition.

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHATE
entities.description: The products of photosynthesis required for reproductive growth.

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The stage of plant development focused on the production of seeds/grains.
